title: croton niveus
intro: Croton niveus is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the croton tree or Adam's rib. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Croton niveus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
